// file: hexcolor.go
// Package hexcolor parses CSS-style hex color strings.
package hexcolor

import (
	"errors"
	"fmt"
)

// ErrInvalid reports a malformed hex color string.
var ErrInvalid = errors.New("invalid hex color")

// Parse parses "#RGB" or "#RRGGBB" (case-insensitive) into 8-bit channels.
// Any other input returns ErrInvalid.
func Parse(s string) (r, g, b uint8, err error) {
	if len(s) == 0 || s[0] != '#' {
		return 0, 0, 0, fmt.Errorf("%w: %q must start with '#'", ErrInvalid, s)
	}
	digits := s[1:]
	switch len(digits) {
	case 3:
		vals, ok := nibbles(digits)
		if !ok {
			return 0, 0, 0, fmt.Errorf("%w: %q has non-hex digits", ErrInvalid, s)
		}
		// #abc expands to #aabbcc.
		return vals[0]*17, vals[1]*17, vals[2]*17, nil
	case 6:
		vals, ok := nibbles(digits)
		if !ok {
			return 0, 0, 0, fmt.Errorf("%w: %q has non-hex digits", ErrInvalid, s)
		}
		return vals[0]<<4 | vals[1], vals[2]<<4 | vals[3], vals[4]<<4 | vals[5], nil
	default:
		return 0, 0, 0, fmt.Errorf("%w: %q must be #RGB or #RRGGBB", ErrInvalid, s)
	}
}

// nibbles decodes each hex digit to its 4-bit value.
func nibbles(s string) ([]uint8, bool) {
	out := make([]uint8, len(s))
	for i := 0; i < len(s); i++ {
		c := s[i]
		switch {
		case c >= '0' && c <= '9':
			out[i] = c - '0'
		case c >= 'a' && c <= 'f':
			out[i] = c - 'a' + 10
		case c >= 'A' && c <= 'F':
			out[i] = c - 'A' + 10
		default:
			return nil, false
		}
	}
	return out, true
}

// file: hexcolor_test.go
package hexcolor

import (
	"errors"
	"testing"
)

func TestParse(t *testing.T) {
	cases := []struct {
		in      string
		r, g, b uint8
		ok      bool
	}{
		{"#fff", 255, 255, 255, true},
		{"#000", 0, 0, 0, true},
		{"#abc", 0xaa, 0xbb, 0xcc, true},
		{"#ABC", 0xaa, 0xbb, 0xcc, true},
		{"#ff8000", 255, 128, 0, true},
		{"#FF8000", 255, 128, 0, true},
		{"#deadbe", 0xde, 0xad, 0xbe, true},
		{"fff", 0, 0, 0, false},      // missing '#'
		{"#ffff", 0, 0, 0, false},    // bad length
		{"#ff", 0, 0, 0, false},      // bad length
		{"#ggg", 0, 0, 0, false},     // non-hex
		{"#ff80zz", 0, 0, 0, false},  // non-hex
		{"", 0, 0, 0, false},         // empty
		{"#", 0, 0, 0, false},        // bare hash
	}
	for _, c := range cases {
		r, g, b, err := Parse(c.in)
		if c.ok {
			if err != nil || r != c.r || g != c.g || b != c.b {
				t.Errorf("Parse(%q) = %d,%d,%d,%v want %d,%d,%d", c.in, r, g, b, err, c.r, c.g, c.b)
			}
			continue
		}
		if err == nil {
			t.Errorf("Parse(%q) succeeded, want error", c.in)
		}
		if !errors.Is(err, ErrInvalid) {
			t.Errorf("Parse(%q) error %v is not ErrInvalid", c.in, err)
		}
	}
}
